# toaster

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Global toast notifications. Mounts the sonner Toaster and handles Shell.Toast commands.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Core.Root` → `ToasterRoot`
  - Uses: `apps.useChromeThemeScope`, `primitives/select-scope.ContentScope`, `shell.ShellCommands`, `shell.ToastArgs`, `ui/theme-engine.useColorMode`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
